name: EGR Exploration Ltd.
description: EGR Exploration Ltd. is a Canada-based exploration stage company focused on acquiring and exploring mineral properties. The company is actively exploring the Detour West Gold Project, which is located contiguous to Agnico Eagle's Detour Lake Gold Mine in the prolific Abitibi Greenstone Belt in northern Ontario, Canada. EGR Exploration is dedicated to discovering and developing high-grade gold resources in world-class mining jurisdictions.
